prompt: Character Sheet: Create a professional character design sheet from the uploaded reference image for a main character: Front view, Side view, Back view, Three facial expressions: focused, skeptical, relieved, Close-up of gear/accessories, Neutral clean background, Consistent character design across all views, Professional concept art style, not cartoonish
promptEn: Character Sheet: Create a professional character design sheet from the uploaded reference image for a main character: Front view, Side view, Back view, Three facial expressions: focused, skeptical, relieved, Close-up of gear/accessories, Neutral clean background, Consistent character design across all views, Professional concept art style, not cartoonish
promptZh: 角色设计图：根据上传的参考图像，为 主角 创建一份专业角色设计图：包含正面视图、侧面视图、背面视图，三种面部表情：专注、怀疑、释然，装备/配饰特写，中性简洁背景，确保所有视图中的角色设计保持一致，采用专业概念艺术风格，而非卡通风格。
